commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; this protected maintainer PR needs human acceptance of the fail-closed auth compatibility change and final CI.; Cleared: The diff narrows the WhatsApp credential trust boundary using existing fs-safe SDK helpers and does not add new dependencies, workflows, secret exposure, or third-party code execution. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds WhatsApp credential-file helpers, routes auth reads, setup detection, socket startup, backup restore/rotation, and atomic saves through symlink-rejecting regular-file checks, and adds focused symlink regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main uses stat/readFile/copyFile and reaches Baileys auth state without a symlink preflight, while the PR adds symlink fixture tests for those paths. I did not execute the filesystem repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; this protected maintainer PR needs human acceptance of the fail-closed auth compatibility change and final CI.
